text:
The director may appoint and, in accordance with law fix the salaries of:

(a) A deputy director.

(b) Such other officers, deputies, technical experts, and employees as may be necessary for the proper discharge of the duties of the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 1. The Department of Motor Vehicles [1500 - 1825]
#### Article 1. Organization of Department [1500 - 1507]
##### § 1507

The director may appoint and, in accordance with law fix the salaries of:

(a) A deputy director.

(b) Such other officers, deputies, technical experts, and employees as may be necessary for the proper discharge of the duties of the department.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The director may appoint and, in accordance with law fix the salaries of:

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Such other officers, deputies, technical experts, and employees as may be necessary for the proper discharge of the duties of the department.
